title: Github spark made a meme coin generator
author: Late_Value8694
selftext: Just got Github spark to create a meme coin creator, and it just made me a meme coin that im making money off right now, and I lose nothing because I have the first buy of the coin. and It only costs 4 dollars to make the coin because I dont have to use thirdparty websites to make the coin for me! some of the analytic data is wrong because i havent wired exactly everything in the backend properly yet, but it has successfuly made me a meme coin im using right now

comments.author: YYetiyetii
comments.body: How can we find the generator?

comments.author: Gold_Guest_41
comments.body: Yeah, I’ve seen that it’s cool. I tried Warpad, which helps build memecoin sites, make Solana vanity addresses, close unused token accounts, and even has an AI tool for generating graphics.
